allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Firebase connection test to MainActivity

Initializes Firebase via Crashlytics SDK, logs a test message and
custom key, and displays connection status \(project name or error\) on screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Firebase crash auto-fix GitHub Actions pipeline

Workflow detects a Firebase Crashlytics crash \(via workflow_dispatch or
repository_dispatch webhook\), creates a fix branch, uses Claude to analyze
the stacktrace and apply a code fix, verifies the build compiles, commits,
and opens a PR back to the base branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(pip3 install pyyaml -q && python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load\(open\('.github/workflows/firebase-crash-autofix.yml'\)\); print\('YAML valid'\)")

Bash(git add .github/workflows/firebase-crash-autofix.yml && git commit -m "fix: avoid YAML parse error in PR creation step

Replace multiline --body string \(which caused | to be parsed as YAML
block scalar\) with writing pr_body.md and using --body-file instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git add .github/scripts/fix_with_claude.py && git commit -m "fix: update Claude model IDs to current versions

Replace deprecated model names with valid current IDs:
claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
